speaker: ANTONY
text: The world and my great office will sometimes

speaker: ANTONY
text: Divide me from your bosom.

speaker: OCTAVIA
text: All which time

speaker: OCTAVIA
text: Before the gods my knee shall bow my prayers

speaker: OCTAVIA
text: To them for you.

speaker: ANTONY
text: Goodnight, sir.—My Octavia,

speaker: ANTONY
text: Read not my blemishes in the world’s report.

speaker: ANTONY
text: I have not kept my square, but that to come

speaker: ANTONY
text: Shall all be done by th’ rule. Good night, dear lady.—

speaker: ANTONY
text: Good night, sir.

speaker: CAESAR
text: Goodnight.

speaker: ANTONY
text: Now, sirrah, you do wish yourself in Egypt?

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: Would I had never come from thence,

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: nor you thither.

speaker: ANTONY
text: If you can, your reason?

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: I see it in my motion, have it not in my

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: tongue. But yet hie you to Egypt again.

speaker: ANTONY
text: Say to me, whose fortunes shall rise higher,

speaker: ANTONY
text: Caesar’s or mine?

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: Caesar’s.

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: Therefore, O Antony, stay not by his side.

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: Thy dæmon—that thy spirit which keeps thee—is

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: Noble, courageous, high, unmatchable,

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: Where Caesar’s is not. But near him, thy angel

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: Becomes afeard, as being o’erpowered. Therefore

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: Make space enough between you.

speaker: ANTONY
text: Speak this no more.

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: To none but thee; no more but when to thee.

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: If thou dost play with him at any game,

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: Thou art sure to lose; and of that natural luck

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: He beats thee ’gainst the odds. Thy luster thickens

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: When he shines by. I say again, thy spirit

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: Is all afraid to govern thee near him;

speaker: SOOTHSAYER
text: But he away, ’tis noble.

speaker: ANTONY
text: Get thee gone.

speaker: ANTONY
text: Say to Ventidius I would speak with him.

speaker: ANTONY
text: He shall to Parthia. Be it art or hap,

speaker: ANTONY
text: He hath spoken true. The very dice obey him,

speaker: ANTONY
text: And in our sports my better cunning faints

speaker: ANTONY
text: Under his chance. If we draw lots, he speeds;

speaker: ANTONY
text: His cocks do win the battle still of mine

speaker: ANTONY
text: When it is all to naught, and his quails ever

speaker: ANTONY
text: Beat mine, inhooped, at odds. I will to Egypt.

speaker: ANTONY
text: And though I make this marriage for my peace,

speaker: ANTONY
text: I’ th’ East my pleasure lies.

speaker: ANTONY
text: O, come, Ventidius.

speaker: ANTONY
text: You must to Parthia; your commission’s ready.

speaker: ANTONY
text: Follow me and receive ’t.
